---
title: "Big_Data_Presentation"
format: pptx
---

## Big Data: Innovations, Applications, and Challenges

- The impact of Big Data on science and society
- Integration with IoT and Cloud Computing
- Navigating privacy and vulnerability

## The Big Data Revolution

- Creating revolutionary breakthroughs in commerce, science, and society [R7]
- Foundational to the future internet [R5]
- Driving advancements in data-aware computing [R5]

## Big Data and the Internet of Things (IoT)

- Synergy between IoT and Big Data computing [R5]
- Enabling technologies: Cloud computing and Data mining [R5]
- Integration with Machine Learning and NLP [R5, R6]

## Key Enabling Technologies

- Cloud Computing [R5]
- Data Mining [R5]
- Machine Learning [R6]
- Natural Language Processing (NLP) [R5]

## Impactful Applications

- Genomic Data: Novel data-aware transfer protocols [R5]
- Crisis Management: Mobile applications for crisis data [R2]
- Smart Technology: Creating inclusive urban environments [R1]

## Challenges and Ethical Considerations

- Privacy, Poverty, and Big Data: A matrix of vulnerabilities [R3]
- Security in wireless and IoT networks [R6]
- Managing data explosion and mobile data usage [R7]

## Conclusion

- Big Data as a pillar of modern computing
- The need for secure and privacy-preserving architectures
- Future directions in automated and intelligent systems

## References

- [R1] The Use of the Smart Technology for Creating an Inclusive Ur.
- [R2] Mobile Application Development for Crisis Data.
- [R3] Privacy, Poverty and Big Data: A Matrix of Vulnerabilities.
- [R5] Internet of Things: A Survey on Enabling Technologies, Protocols, and Applications.
